function.message: Processed the next inbound note and completed OCR/frontmatter migration for the four existing purchase records requested. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter while preserving each original note body. The fifth requested path (`50_finance/purchases/_2026_04_12__eur_000020__bill__studio_parts_magnet_and_felt.md`) does not exist in the workspace, so it could not be OCR-processed. Deleted the processed inbox file per workflow.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree/read/context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflows/schemas before task work, applied finance schema fields only, preserved note bodies, and deleted inbox item after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence from the four existing purchase files showed all required bill schema fields and line items, enabling exact frontmatter extraction per `finance-record-frontmatter.md`. A direct read of the fifth requested underscore path failed with file-not-found and a workspace-wide find confirmed no such file exists.

write frontmatter to four existing purchase files
